- **Sub-Amount 2**: "Omzet"  
- **Sub-Amount 3**: "Rp 800.000"  
- **Truncated Transaction 2**: "P..."

### 2. Transaction Rows (Category, Badges, Amount)  
#### First Transaction Row  
- **Category**: Truncated to "PL..." (likely "PL..." as full text is cut off).  
- **Badges**:  
  - 1st Badge: Light green pill with icon (person silhouette) and text "Bu Si".  
  - 2nd Badge: Light gray pill with icon (person silhouette) and text "Mam:".  
- **Amount**: "+Rp 7.500" (green, positive value).  
- **Additional Details**:  
  - Quantity: "3 x" (yellow pill with "3x PP" text).  
  - Sub-amounts: "Rp 2.500", "Omzet", "Rp 800.000".  


#### Second Transaction Row  
- **Category**: Truncated to "P..." (likely "P..." as full text is cut off).  
- **Badges**: 1 light gray pill with icon (person silhouette) and text "Pa:" (truncated).  
- **Amount**: Not visible (truncated or cut off).  


### 3. Filter Chips/Pills Row  
- **Filter Button**: "Filter Nominal" (white pill with filter icon, top of screen).  
- **No other filter chips** (e.g., "Semua", "Yangti", "Mama", "Tidak ada") are present.  


### 4. Truncated Text  
- "PL..." (first transaction category).  
- "P..." (second transaction category).  
- "Bu Si" (badge text, likely truncated from longer name).  
- "Mam:" (badge text, likely truncated from longer name).  
- "Pa:" (badge text, likely truncated from longer name).  


### 5. Horizontal Overflow  
- No horizontal overflow off the right edge (all elements fit within the 375px viewport).
